purpose: Negative mutation benchmark for Env18 Lambda PassRole with iam:PassedToService scoped away from Lambda
description: Alice can create a Lambda function and has iam:PassRole on a Lambda-trusted admin role, but the PassRole statement is scoped to ec2.amazonaws.com.

ground_truth.reasoning: The target role trusts Lambda and is admin-equivalent, but Alice's PassRole grant cannot be used with Lambda because iam:PassedToService is scoped to ec2.amazonaws.com.

assertion_strategy: The benchmark wrapper asserts the Lambda CreateFunction edge, exact PassRole edge with iam:PassedToService=ec2.amazonaws.com condition evidence, Lambda service trust edge, zero validated passrole_lambda findings, at least one precondition_only passrole_lambda finding, and a failed passrole_condition_scoped_to_lambda_or_absent check.
